<context>
Cognitive mode: constructive-architect
Type: flexible
</context>

<objective>
Manage Capillary Neo dataflow rules from the terminal using neo-cli. Pull rules as .dag.ts files, edit locally, validate, push changes, manage the full lifecycle (draft → publish → approve → live), execute DAGs, and diagnose issues with integrated observability. Auto-detects Neo projects via .neorc.

Phases:

- detect: Check for .neorc to confirm Neo project context; verify neo-cli is installed and authenticated
- author: Create or edit .dag.ts rule files using Neo DAG patterns (decorators, block types, relations) (optional)
- validate: Run neo validate for structural, schema, and lint checks; fix reported issues (optional)
- sync: Pull, push, diff, and status operations to sync local rules with remote (optional)
- lifecycle: Manage rule lifecycle — publish, approve, and promote to live (optional)
- observe: Execute DAGs, correlate NR metrics + Loki logs, diagnose failures (optional)
  </objective>
